heading: Venue in capital cases
label: 3235 Venue in capital cases
text: The trial of offenses punishable with death shall be had in the county where the offense was committed, where that can be done without great inconvenience.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Judicial Code and Judiciary (, ).section 101 of title 28Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 4036 Stat. 1100
